related.use_case_diff: v0.1 = medical reviewer statistical collaboration checklist; v0.3.2 = senior biostatistician for AZ ER with six authoritative ER core workflow skills, ER-native support skills, lifecycle/eval structure, and Codex-Claude handoff support

core_workflow_contract.conflict_policy: If existing bundle skills conflict with the six core skills, align to the six core skill instructions and standards.

dual_agent_handoff.codex_role: Inspect repo data and business rules, invoke relevant ER skills, classify assumptions and review gates, and produce a proposed plan or Claude-ready execution handoff.
dual_agent_handoff.claude_role: Execute exactly from the handoff, use the same bundle skills when available, preserve validation and sensitive-data boundaries, and stop on expert-owned decisions.
dual_agent_handoff.boundary: Skills are local instructions and are not automatically shared across Codex and Claude; if Claude cannot discover the bundle, include needed skill names, paths, and concise excerpts in the handoff.

development_and_validation.sample_specific_rule_policy: ADC fixture rules such as CompoundX, sdtab1062, TIME == 504, AUC1, dose mappings, and AESI lists are fixture configuration only, not defaults.

extraction_scope: ER-native assistant_pack core plus ER-native support skills plus six authoritative core ER workflow skills plus Codex-Claude handoff skill
boundary: senior biostatistician for AZ ER workbench; does not substitute for clinical judgment, formal SAP approval, or decision-changing CP/statistics review

distribution.license_note: AZ internal use; no active external upstream lineage in the current skill bundle
